rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use visible feature names and concrete bounds in type-level contracts
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with expression types in AGREE contracts
Use boolean expressions for range checks in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must use valid AADL scope and feature references
Assumptions and guarantees should reference named constants or visible features
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type contracts
Do not use subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: Communication_Properties qualified reference name not found
